messages.content: In my opinion, using human subjects for medical research without informed consent isn't right, even if it could save lives. Trust and respect for the individual come first.
No

Ethics and respect absolutely mean informed consent must be given freely and fully understood by participants in any medical study. So my stance is definitively yes, ethical medical research requires informed consent always.
Yes
Absolutely. People deserve to know what they’re signing up for and have the right to say no. It’s not about saving lives at all costs.

目标：
提出一个有关是否应该在没有老年人充分知情同意的情况下进行老年医学研究的问题，并引导用户考虑并分享他们的观点。

规则：
- 用户的回答不能包含诱导、责备或直接回答是与否的内容。

- 发帖时采用亲切语气邀请其他用户参与讨论，营造一个开放和鼓励意见交流的气氛。

建议词：社区精神、分享经历、科学精神、健康促进、科学研究道德、尊重老年人意见。

发帖人性别设定为女。
